name: Cool Touch Pregnancy U-Shaped Body Pillow White - Threshold™: Hypoallergenic, Medium Density, Indoor Use, Knitted Fabric
description:
Enjoy a restful night during your pregnancy with the Cool Touch Pregnancy U-Shaped Body Pillow from Threshold™. Designed for pregnancy, this white body pillow made with soft and stretchy fabric offers the right support for your body. The pregnancy body pillow features a hypoallergenic design.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
